message:
fix(rchd): eliminate broken pipe errors from protocol deadlock

Server-side: Replace read_to_string (waits for EOF) with
read_line_with_limit (reads single newline-terminated line) for
BuildHeartbeat, IngestTelemetry, and TestRun handlers. The client
sends single-line JSON bodies but never closes the write half,
causing the server to block until client timeout, then get broken
pipe when writing the response to a closed socket.

Client-side: Add writer.shutdown() after flush in send_telemetry,
send_test_run, and send_build_heartbeat for belt-and-suspenders.

Logging: Downgrade BrokenPipe from warn to debug to reduce log noise
from clients that legitimately disconnect early.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
